summary: Detailed audit of the Queen Anne's Revenge script identifying critical lack of time/location anchors. Found that 5 of 9 chapters have zero specific dates. The climax chapter (Great Allen capture) and Charleston Blockade chapter — both major historical events — contain no dates at all. Root cause analysis traces the issue to: (1) writer prompt lacking anchor enforcement rules, (2) AI preferring atmospheric prose over date pinning, (3) structure definitions not requiring temporal grounding, (4) outline lacking date fields per chapter.
